narrative:
Brookville-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,123 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.9 percentage points.
